title: TUI Visible Message Smoke
objective: Launch the TUI, send a real user message through stdin, and require the expected marker to render in terminal output. This is UI smoke coverage; structured agent-turn correctness is proven by Gateway and channel scenarios.

phases.title: Provision TUI Env
phases.intent: Create a disposable OpenClaw env without starting the gateway yet so Kova auth is applied before the gateway process boots.

phases.title: Start Gateway
phases.intent: Start the gateway after auth/provider config is already present in the OpenClaw home.

phases.title: TUI Message
phases.intent: Exercise the user-visible terminal input path and verify the expected marker renders in terminal output.
commands: node {kovaRoot}/support/run-tui-message-turn.mjs --env {env} --session kova-tui-message --message 'Reply with exact ASCII text KOVA_AGENT_OK only.' --expected-text KOVA_AGENT_OK --timeout 120000
evidence: expected marker rendered in terminal output

phases.title: Post-TUI Gateway Health
phases.intent: Verify the gateway remains responsive after the TUI message turn.
